description:
Specification

Product Information

Product Type :Single Box Product

Product Name:80cm bathroom mirror, round mirror, wall mount

Main Color:Antique Silver

Main Material:MDF

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):31.50

Assembled Width (in.):1.18

Assembled Height (in.):31.50

Product Weight (lbs.):16.00

Package Size

Length (in.):35.00

Width (in.):35.00

Height (in.):2.70

Weight (lbs.):18.40

Product Features

  • 80cm Large Diameter to Elevate Space Perception – With an 80cm (31.5 inches) wide circular design, this mirror acts as a "space expander" for any room. Its broad reflective area bounces light around, instantly making cramped bedrooms, narrow hallways, or small bathrooms feel more spacious and luminous—ideal for refreshing your home’s atmosphere without major renovations.
  • Effortless Wall-Mount Setup for Instant Use – This mirror is engineered for easy wall installation, coming complete with pre-drilled holes, matching screws, and step-by-step instructions. No need for complicated tools or hiring a handyman; you can securely mount it on any solid wall (like bathroom tile, bedroom drywall, or entryway wood) in under 15 minutes.
  • Multi-Room Versatility for All Decor Needs – From above the bathroom vanity for daily grooming to above the living room sofa as a statement decor piece, or even in the entryway to check your look before heading out—this 80cm round mirror fits seamlessly into every space. Its classic circular shape complements both modern and traditional interior styles.
  • Premium Materials for Durable Performance – Made with high-quality float glass, the mirror delivers a clear, distortion-free reflection that stays sharp over time. The thickened backboard (with anti-rust treatment) adds structural stability, preventing the mirror from bending or deforming, while the smooth edge polishing ensures safe use without sharp corners.
  • Functional & Decorative Dual Purpose – More than just a tool for checking your appearance, this mirror enhances your home’s aesthetic. It can highlight wall art nearby, reflect beautiful window views, or add a touch of elegance to plain walls—blending practicality with style to meet all your daily and decorative needs.
